title: [BUG] Charts are disappearing from the worklist.
author: ArkhipovK
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Charts are disappearing from the worklist.

Lib version: 3.8.1

## Steps To Reproduce

Place any chart within template and it will disappear after compilation

## The expected behaviour:

All charts are still there

comments.author: Alanscut
comments.body: exceljs does not support charts for the time being. This is the direction of our efforts. Of course, we also welcome people to tackle the problem.

comments.author: ArkhipovK
comments.body: Can you describe essense of the problem?  As i suppose, chart takes values from some particular cells, so all you have to do is dont wipe it during the template compilation.

comments.author: Alanscut
comments.body: @ArkhipovK When you add a chart to an excel file, there are chart1.xml, colors1.xml, style1.xml, and chart1.xml.rels to describe it, but exceljs does not have the corresponding code to parse these files, so the chart will disappear.

comments.author: ArkhipovK
comments.body: @Alanscut is it worth to wait this feature in any time sooner?

comments.author: chdh
comments.body:
> @ArkhipovK When you add a chart to an excel file, there are chart1.xml, colors1.xml, style1.xml, and chart1.xml.rels to describe it, but exceljs does not have the corresponding code to parse these files, so the chart will disappear.

Could these XML objects be kept unparsed internally until the chart support is implemented? Then it would be possible to load a template Workbook from a file, modify it and store it into a new file, so that the charts survive.

comments.author: Emiya0306
comments.body: So is any progress? I don't think that ExcelJs lost the charts is acceptable. 😭 It should keep it not lost.
